name: Winter Tomato Soup with Vermicelli
recipeIngredient: Sea salt and pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the canned tomatoes and keep their liquid. Add enough water to fill the can (or cans), then return to heat.
2. Blend or puree the tomatoes through a sieve or food mill.
3. Heat oil in a heavy-bottomed soup pot, sauté onion with 2 cloves of garlic until onion is tender.
4. Stir in tomato puree and cook for 10 minutes.
5. Add remaining garlic, liquid from the tomatoes, tomato paste, salt, pepper, marjoram, and thyme to the pot.
6. Simmer gently until vermicelli is cooked through (al dente). Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
7. Serve hot.
